data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of suggesting alternatives when an employee is at risk of exceeding their overtime threshold. However, the evidence provided does not include any API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need to suggest alternatives, but there is no direct evidence demonstrating that this requirement is implemented or validated, leading to a clear gap in coverage.
gaps: No evidence of API reads or persisted state checks confirming the suggestion of alternatives (assign to different employee).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the suggestion of alternatives.
